text.title: React Hooks Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in production React apps; each ESLint-detectable or grep-detectable.

antipattern.symptom: `useState`/`useEffect`/`useMemo` appears inside `if`, after early `return`, or after an `await`. Dev console reports "Rendered fewer hooks than expected".
antipattern.root-cause: React tracks hook state by call order. A conditional call shifts the order on subsequent renders, mismatching the internal linked list and corrupting state.
antipattern.fix: Pull every hook to the top of the component body. Move conditional logic AFTER all hook calls. Enable `react-hooks/rules-of-hooks: error` in ESLint to block PRs.

antipattern.symptom: Effect captures `count` from outer scope but `count` is missing from the dep array; effect re-runs use the value from the render where it was first defined.
antipattern.root-cause: Hooks close over the values from the render they were created in. Without listing the value in deps, React does not re-create the closure when the value changes.
antipattern.fix: Run `eslint --rule react-hooks/exhaustive-deps:error` and fix every warning. If the value SHOULD be excluded (e.g. ref-like), wrap it in `useRef` so it does not need to be a dep.

antipattern.symptom: Component holds `const [doubled, setDoubled] = useState(count * 2)` + `useEffect(() => setDoubled(count * 2), [count])`. UI flashes wrong value for one frame after `count` changes.
antipattern.root-cause: Mirroring derivable state into `useState` creates two sources of truth. The effect fires AFTER render, so the stale value renders once before the effect's `setDoubled` schedules a second render.
antipattern.fix: Delete the state + effect. Compute `const doubled = count * 2` inline in render. If memoization needed for a memo'd child, use `useMemo`.

antipattern.symptom: Every callback wrapped in `useCallback`, every object literal in `useMemo`. Bundle size and render allocations grow; profiler shows memo overhead exceeds memo savings.
antipattern.root-cause: Memoization has fixed cost (dep comparison + bookkeeping). On cheap renders that cost exceeds the work it would save. React 19 compiler now handles automatic memoization; manual wrapping is mostly noise.
antipattern.fix: Enable React Compiler (React 19+). For pre-19 code, restrict `useMemo`/`useCallback` to (a) memo'd-child props, (b) hook deps, (c) profiled hot paths >1ms. Audit existing memos and remove the unjustified ones.
